artifact: Counts distinct players matching the rating range and low defensive work rate.
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) AS player_count FROM player_attributes WHERE overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65 AND defensive_work_rate = 'low';
